$schema: Allowlist for check-no-silent-rep-clears.mjs. Each entry: file:line that the gate would otherwise flag, with a written reason in `_reasons`. Adding an entry means you've verified the clear is intentional, cannot drop a user's picked value in a real submission flow, and has been reviewed by someone other than the author.

_reasons.app/dashboard/new-deal/page.tsx:269: repId-change effect — blitz availability is rep-scoped (admin can only pick a blitz the chosen rep is approved for), so an old blitz must be cleared when the rep changes. Safe: blitz auto-selection on a new rep does not preserve stale state. setterId is preserved (validator catches mismatches). Re-pinned from :268 (line shift from agent edits above, 2026-06-01).
_reasons.app/dashboard/new-deal/page.tsx:1070: Admin's closer picker — same rationale as :269. The chosen blitz may no longer match the new closer's blitz list. setterId is explicitly NOT cleared here (was the regression source). Re-pinned from :1066.
_reasons.app/dashboard/new-deal/page.tsx:1802: Lead-source toggle off `blitz` — blitz <select> is conditionally rendered only when leadSource === 'blitz', so an orphan blitzId would persist invisibly. Safe to clear. setterId is preserved. Re-pinned from :1798.
_reasons.app/dashboard/mobile/MobileNewDeal.tsx:3: Mobile equivalent of the desktop :269 repId-change effect. Same rationale. Re-pinned from :306.
_reasons.app/dashboard/mobile/MobileNewDeal.tsx:1: Mobile equivalent of the desktop :1802 lead-source toggle. Same rationale. Re-pinned from :1981.
_reasons.app/dashboard/mobile/MobileProjectDetail: useState initializer for editDraft — first-render default empty values, not a reactive clear. Gate false-positive (regex matches `setterId: ''` on a line that also has `repId: ''`). Re-pinned from :133.

useState initializer for editDraft — first-render default empty values, not a reactive clear. Gate false-positive (matches the bare `blitzId: ''` token on a line that starts with `leadSource: ''`). Re-pinned from :137.
